citation.article_title: Monitoring vegetation systems in the great plains with ERTS
citation.author: Rouse Jr

citation.article_title: Overview of the radiometric and biophysical performance of the MODIS vegetation indices
citation.author: Huete
citation.unstructured_citation: Huete, A., Didan, K., Miura, T., Rodriguez, E. P., Gao, X., & Ferreira, L. G. (2002). Overview of the radiometric and biophysical performance of the MODIS vegetation indices. Remote Sensing of Environment, 83(1-2), 195–213. https://doi.org/10.1016/S0034-4257(02)00096-2

citation.article_title: The use of the normalized difference water index (NDWI) in the delineation of open water features
citation.author: McFeeters
citation.unstructured_citation: McFeeters, S. K. (1996). The use of the normalized difference water index (NDWI) in the delineation of open water features. International Journal of Remote Sensing, 17(7), 1425–1432. https://doi.org/10.1080/01431169608948714

citation.author: Cressie
citation.unstructured_citation: Cressie, N. A. (1993). Statistics for spatial data. John Wiley & Sons. https://doi.org/10.1002/9781119115151.ch1

citation.author: Pebesma
citation.unstructured_citation: Pebesma, E. (2018). Simple features for R: Standardized support for spatial vector data. The R Journal, 10(1), 439–446. https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2018-009

citation.article_title: Geospatial modeling of near subsurface temperatures of the contiguous United States for assessment of materials degradation
citation.author: Gordon
citation.unstructured_citation: Gordon, J. E., Akanbi, O. D., Bhuvanagiri, D. C., Omodolor, H. E., Mandayam, V., French, R. H., Yarus, J. M., & Barcelos, E. I. (2025). Geospatial modeling of near subsurface temperatures of the contiguous United States for assessment of materials degradation. Scientific Reports, 15(1), 1053. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-024-85050-3

citation.article_title: Integrating multimodal geospatiotemporal data for societal, economic, and environmental (SEE) analysis of large agricultural systems
citation.author: Akanbi
citation.journal_title: 2024 IEEE international conference on big data (BigData)
citation.unstructured_citation: Akanbi, O. D., Li, J., Mandayam, V., Nihar, A., Wu, Y., Bruckman, L. S., Yarus, J. M., Barcelos, E. I., & French, R. H. (2024). Integrating multimodal geospatiotemporal data for societal, economic, and environmental (SEE) analysis of large agricultural systems. 2024 IEEE International Conference on Big Data (BigData), 1–1. https://doi.org/10.1109/BigData62323.2024.10825905

citation.article_title: Integrating multiscale geospatial analysis for monitoring crop growth, nutrient distribution, and hydrological dynamics in large-scale agricultural systems

citation.journal_title: Journal of Geovisualization and Spatial Analysis
citation.unstructured_citation: Akanbi, O. D., Bhuvanagiri, D. C., Barcelos, E. I., Nihar, A., Gonzalez Hernandez, B., Yarus, J. M., & French, R. H. (2024). Integrating multiscale geospatial analysis for monitoring crop growth, nutrient distribution, and hydrological dynamics in large-scale agricultural systems. Journal of Geovisualization and Spatial Analysis, 8(1), 9. https://doi.org/10.1007/s41651-023-00164-y

citation.article_title: Modification of normalised difference water index (NDWI) to enhance open water features in remotely sensed imagery
citation.author: Xu

citation.author: Rondeaux

citation.article_title: Atmospherically resistant vegetation index (ARVI) for EOS-MODIS
citation.author: Kaufman
citation.journal_title: IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
citation.unstructured_citation: Kaufman, Y. J., & Tanré, D. (1992). Atmospherically resistant vegetation index (ARVI) for EOS-MODIS. IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 30(2), 261–270. https://doi.org/10.1109/36.134076
